Contractor.title: Contractor Profile
Contractor.description: Represents a contractor who has requested access to the Innovation Kitchen and Bath leads ledger.

approved.description: Whether the contractor is approved by the admin to view and edit leads.

requestedAt.description: Timestamp when the access request was submitted.

approvedAt.description: Timestamp when the admin approved access.

approvedBy.description: Email of the admin who approved access.

Consultation.title: Homeowner Consultation Lead
Consultation.description: Represents an incoming project lead submitted by a Central Florida homeowner.

/contractors/{contractorId}.description: Secured profiles of contractors and partners requesting access.

/consultations/{consultationId}.description: Central Florida kitchen & bath project leads and booked consultations.
